inputs.label: Number of Deaths
inputs.businessContext: Total observed deaths in the cohort or population during the time period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total observed deaths in the cohort or population during the time period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman diliminde kohort veya popülasyonda gözlemlenen toplam ölüm sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der beobachteten Todesfälle in der Kohorte oder Bevölkerung während des Zeitraums.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de décès observés dans la cohorte ou la population pendant la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de muertes observadas en la cohorte o población durante el período de tiempo.

inputs.label: Total Population at Risk
inputs.businessContext: The average number of individuals at risk of death during the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average number of individuals at risk of death during the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem boyunca ölüm riski altındaki ortalama birey sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl der Personen, die im Zeitraum einem Sterberisiko ausgesetzt sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen d'individus à risque de décès pendant la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de individuos en riesgo de muerte durante el período.

inputs.label: Observation Period
inputs.businessContext: The length of time over which deaths and population exposure are measured.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of time over which deaths and population exposure are measured.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölümlerin ve nüfus maruziyetinin ölçüldüğü zaman aralığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitraum, über den Todesfälle und Bevölkerungsrisiko gemessen werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée sur laquelle les décès et l'exposition de la population sont mesurés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del tiempo durante el cual se miden las muertes y la exposición de la población.

inputs.label: Rate Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Standard scaling factor for mortality rate (e.g., deaths per 100,000).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard scaling factor for mortality rate (e.g., deaths per 100,000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölüm oranı için standart ölçekleme faktörü (ör. 100.000'de ölüm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Skalierungsfaktor für die Sterblichkeitsrate (z. B. Todesfälle pro 100.000).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'échelle standard pour le taux de mortalité (par exemple, décès pour 100 000).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de escala estándar para la tasa de mortalidad (ej., muertes por cada 100,000).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
